name: Oatmeal Fudge Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Grease a jelly roll pan measuring 15 x 10.5 x 1 inches.
3. In a large bowl, mix together the brown sugar and margarine or butter until well combined.
4. Add the eggs and vanilla; stir until smooth.
5. Stir in the Bisquick® baking mix and oats until fully incorporated.
6. In a saucepan over low heat, melt the chocolate chips with the sweetened condensed milk, 2 tablespoons of butter, and salt. Stir constantly until smooth.
7. Mix in the chopped nuts and additional vanilla.
8. Using greased hands, press about two-thirds of the oatmeal mixture into the prepared pan.
9. Spread the chocolate mixture evenly over the oatmeal layer.
10. Drop the remaining oatmeal mixture by tablespoons onto the top.
11. Bake for approximately 30 minutes until lightly browned.
12. Allow to cool before cutting into bars, each about 2 inches by 1 inch.
Makes 70 bars.
